nasb.text: For just as the Father has life in Himself, even so He gave to the Son also to have life in Himself;

esv.text: For as the Father has life in himself, so he has granted the Son also to have life in himself.

cnv.text: 就如父是生命的源頭，照樣他也使子成為生命的源頭，

ccb.text: 因为正如父自己是生命的源头，祂也同样让子作生命的源头，

csbs.text: 原来，父怎样在自己里面有生命，也照样使子在自己里面有生命；
